title: Flint Flamer Font
description: A very hot text font, ready to warm everyone's hearts with words <3
body:
resourcepack by: FlorFlamer
___

## 💥 | Important !!!

The recorce pack only works 100% if you run it in English (US).

_New supported languages will be added over time._

___

## ※ Information:

A glowing text that appears with each key press to create the most Fire phrases. PS: No need to worry about skin burns...

With icons everywhere and bright colors in every important word ✍ (★‿★)

> 📙 Font text | Font smaller and minimalist
> 
> 🩸 Effect´s | Now with icons
> 
> 🧭 Game mode | Now with icons and color text
